metadata.description: Plugins connecting Claude Code to external coding agents (OpenAI Codex, Google Antigravity), plus a multi-agent converger that debates a prompt across all three.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Delegate image generation, hard reasoning, code review, browser tasks, session resume, and arbitrary execs to OpenAI Codex CLI via a structured 5-section handoff spec.

plugins.name: agy
plugins.description: Bridge to Google's Antigravity CLI for capabilities Claude Code lacks: 1M-token long-context analysis (Gemini 3 Pro), Nano Banana Pro image generation, and Veo video generation, plus a raw passthrough.

plugins.name: contexthub
plugins.description: Stage a systematic four-phase debate among Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and Google Antigravity on a single hard prompt — converging on a synthesized response that surfaces consensus and remaining disagreements.
